description: Markdown-to-deck composer with 19 style presets (6 original house + 13 canonical content-to-slides) and a single-file HTML export. Type markdown on the left, watch the deck render live on the right, ship the resulting deck as one portable .html file.
features: 19 style presets across four categories — 6 original house templates (Minimalist, Terminal, Magazine, Gradient, Paper, Council Signal) plus the 13 canonical content-to-slides presets (Bold Signal, Electric Studio, Creative Voltage, Dark Botanical, Notebook Tabs, Pastel Geometry, Split Pastel, Vintage Editorial, Simployer, Neon Cyber, Terminal Green, Swiss Modern, Paper & Ink)
Categorised gallery (Dark / Light / Specialty) with named font pairings — Google Fonts + Fontshare loaded on demand inside the exported deck
Viewport-locked output — clamp() typography, overflow: hidden, height breakpoints at 700/600/500px so decks fit phones, tablets, and 1920×1080 alike
Live iframe preview with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, click left/right edge) and page counter
Markdown editor with --- slide breaks and # / ## titles — matches the existing content-to-slides convention
Single-file portable HTML export — embedded CSS + JS, zero dependencies, works offline
Pre-seeded with a real Wilson household excerpt; localStorage persistence for markdown, title, and active template

quality_bounds._note: Slide Builder UI is dominated by static editor chrome with a small live-preview iframe; gallery interactions yield ~80% same-cluster frames legitimately. Default 0.65 produces false positives here.
